name: Qorvex
description: Albrecht Entrati designed Qorvex to protect a Chosen Operator from the unique hazards of his lab. A Crucible Core gives Qorvex high survivability as he provides crowd control.
passiveDescription: Weapons wielded by Qorvex have an additional +|PUNCH_THROUGH| Punch Through.

abilities.name: Chyrinka Pillar
abilities.description: Summon a Chyrinka Pillar that slows enemies. It pulses <DT_RADIATION_COLOR>Radiation Damage with a guaranteed Status Effect.

abilities.name: Containment Wall
abilities.description: Contain the threat. Qorvex summons walls that slam together, damaging all enemies caught between them and inflicting <DT_RADIATION_COLOR>Radiation Status.

abilities.name: Disometric Guard
abilities.description: Guard yourself and nearby allies against Status Effects. Each time Qorvex kills or assists in killing an enemy affected by <DT_RADIATION_COLOR>Radiation Status, the number of Status Effects Disometric Guard can prevent increases.

abilities.name: Crucible Blast
abilities.description: Release a beam from Qorvex's Crucible Core. Each enemy struck suffers <DT_RADIATION_COLOR>Radiation Damage with a guaranteed Status Effect. Enemies affected by <DT_RADIATION_COLOR>Radiation Status explode in a chain reaction.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Albrecht Entrati designed Qorvex to protect a Chosen Operator from the unique hazards of his lab. A Crucible Core gives Qorvex high survivability as he provides crowd control.

components.name: Chassis
components.description: Chassis component of the Qorvex Warframe.

drops.location: Deimos/Albrecht's Laboratories (Level  65 - 70 Entrati Lab Bounty), Rotation C

components.name: Echo Voca
components.description:
The quietest and most elusive of Voidtongue utterances. Sought after but never found by Albrecht.

Location: Albrecht's Laboratories (Deimos)

components.name: Neuroptics
components.description: Neuroptics component of the Qorvex Warframe.

drops.location: Deimos/Albrecht's Laboratories (Level  55 - 60 Entrati Lab Bounty), Rotation C

components.name: Systems
components.description: Systems component of the Qorvex Warframe.

drops.location: Deimos/Albrecht's Laboratories (Level  75 - 80 Entrati Lab Bounty), Rotation C
